# BEGIN LSCACHE
## LITESPEED WP CACHE PLUGIN - Do not edit the contents of this block! ##
<IfModule mod_rewrite.c>
RewriteEngine on
RewriteRule litespeed/debug/.*\.log$ - [F,L]
RewriteRule \.litespeed_conf\.dat - [F,L]
</IfModule>
<IfModule LiteSpeed>
CacheLookup on
RewriteRule .* - [E=Cache-Control:no-autoflush]

### marker ASYNC start ###
RewriteCond %{REQUEST_URI} /wp-admin/admin-ajax\.php
RewriteCond %{QUERY_STRING} action=async_litespeed
RewriteRule .* - [E=noabort:1]
### marker ASYNC end ###

### marker DROPQS start ###
CacheKeyModify -qs:fbclid
CacheKeyModify -qs:gclid
CacheKeyModify -qs:utm*
CacheKeyModify -qs:_ga
### marker DROPQS end ###

</IfModule>
## LITESPEED WP CACHE PLUGIN - Do not edit the contents of this block! ##
# END LSCACHE

# ─── GENERAL SECURITY ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Options -Indexes

<IfModule mod_headers.c>
  Header set X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff"
  Header set X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN"
  Header set X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block"
  Header set Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
  Header set Content-Security-Policy "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' https: data:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov https://www.ebi.ac.uk https://www.zohoapis.in;"
</IfModule>

# ─── BLOCK SENSITIVE FILES FROM DIRECT BROWSER ACCESS ───────────────────────
# Uses Apache 2.4 syntax (compatible with LiteSpeed)
<FilesMatch "(users|queries|audit_log|zoho_token|products_master)\.(?:json|csv)$">
  Require all denied
</FilesMatch>

<FilesMatch "\.(log|bak|tmp|sql|env|cache)$">
  Require all denied
</FilesMatch>

# Block hidden files (dot files) except .well-known
<FilesMatch "^\.(?!well-known)">
  Require all denied
</FilesMatch>

# Block direct access to functions.php only (others have session gates inside)
<FilesMatch "^functions\.php$">
  Require all denied
</FilesMatch>

# ─── PHP HARDENING ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
<IfModule mod_php8.c>
  php_value session.cookie_httponly 1
  php_value session.cookie_secure 1
  php_flag  session.use_only_cookies 1
</IfModule>
<IfModule mod_php7.c>
  php_value session.cookie_httponly 1
  php_value session.cookie_secure 1
  php_flag  session.use_only_cookies 1
</IfModule>

# ─── REWRITE ENGINE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
RewriteEngine On

# 1. Force HTTPS + www
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off [OR]
RewriteCond %{HTTP_HOST} !^www\.abchem\.co\.in$ [NC]
RewriteRule ^(.*)$ https://www.abchem.co.in/$1 [L,R=301]

# 2. Skip rewrites for real files and directories
RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} -f [OR]
RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} -d
RewriteRule ^ - [L]

# ─── CLEAN PAGE URLS (no .php) ───────────────────────────────────────────────

# Auth
RewriteRule ^signin$          signin.php    [L,QSA,NC]
RewriteRule ^signup$          signup.php    [L,QSA,NC]
RewriteRule ^logout$          logout.php    [L,QSA,NC]

# Main pages
RewriteRule ^catalog$         catalog.php   [L,QSA,NC]
RewriteRule ^admin$           admin.php     [L,QSA,NC]
RewriteRule ^account$         account.php   [L,QSA,NC]
RewriteRule ^contact$         contact.php   [L,QSA,NC]
RewriteRule ^about$           about.php     [L,QSA,NC]

# Service pages
RewriteRule ^custom-synthesis$ custom-synthesis.php [L,QSA,NC]
RewriteRule ^purification$    purification.php  [L,QSA,NC]
RewriteRule ^structure-search$ structure-search.php [L,QSA,NC]

# Admin tools (gate handled inside PHP, not here)
RewriteRule ^pubchem$         pubchem_fetch.php [L,QSA,NC]
RewriteRule ^zoho-connect$    zoho_helper.php?connect=1 [L,QSA,NC]

# Product detail: /product/slug-name → product.php?slug=slug-name
RewriteRule ^product/([a-z0-9][a-z0-9\-]*)$ product.php?slug=$1 [L,QSA,NC]

# Category / type browse
RewriteRule ^category/([a-z0-9\-]+)$ catalog.php?category=$1 [L,QSA,NC]
RewriteRule ^type/([a-z0-9\-]+)$     catalog.php?type=$1     [L,QSA,NC]

# ─── PERFORMANCE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
<IfModule mod_deflate.c>
  AddOutputFilterByType DEFLATE text/html text/css application/javascript application/json image/svg+xml
</IfModule>

<IfModule mod_expires.c>
  ExpiresActive On
  ExpiresByType text/css                  "access plus 1 month"
  ExpiresByType application/javascript    "access plus 1 month"
  ExpiresByType image/png                 "access plus 1 year"
  ExpiresByType image/webp                "access plus 1 year"
  ExpiresByType image/jpeg                "access plus 1 year"
  ExpiresByType image/svg+xml             "access plus 1 year"
  ExpiresByType application/json          "access plus 1 hour"
</IfModule>

# ─── DEFAULT INDEX ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
DirectoryIndex index.php index.html
